utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes keys for all five. Next, verify each is fully specified with required details (coverage with costs). 1) health_coverage: It specifies physical and mental health insurance with current costs and recommended plan costs; includes add-ons with costs. Meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: Home/contents insurance with current cost and recommended cost; add-ons list current costs. Meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: Travel insurance with current cost and recommended cost; add-on includes per-day costs. Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: Provides enhancement services with costs (ranges and estimates for adult children, bundling savings). Meets requirement. 5) total_budget: Provides consolidated monthly cost estimate. Meets requirement. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan, we identify explicit product names that appear in the ground-truth ratings. These are: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health recommendation), PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health recommendation), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property/home content recommendation), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel recommendation). Other items mentioned (Bradesco Executive International, ExecutiveCare Wellness, PremiumSecure Luxury, ExecutiveGlobal Platinum, concierge services, add-ons, and company benefits) either are not listed in the ground-truth catalog or are generic add-ons without specific rated product names. We therefore map only the named plans that match entries in the ground-truth ratings.
